prompt: generate a textile map embroidered on a quilt, with different fabric patterns representing various terrains, stitched rivers and roads, and appliqué landmarks
prompt_refined: Detailed textile map, intricately embroidered onto a large quilt, featuring diverse fabric patterns and textures depicting various geographic terrains. Precisely stitched winding rivers and roads traverse the map, while distinct, three-dimensional appliqué landmarks are strategically placed. Overhead view, soft even lighting.
